violations.text: The walk-in fan guards were observed in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025
An accumulation of debris was observed at the refuse area. Establishment must maintain refuse area as frequently as needed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2025

The floor in the walk-in cooler has an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2025
